text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer runs in the Japanese Derby. Mejiro
Ryan is extremely motivated for the race, but
there's someone else even more determined than
her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's another front runner named Ines Fujin. Mejiro
Palmer exchanges simple greetings with her
before the race, but this only serves to get Ines
even more fired up. And so, the heated race
begins.
